summary: PART I Corporate History The Company was originally incorporated on June 30, 2021, in the State of Nevada with the name, Prime Time Holdings, Inc. On June 30, 2021, our current director, Jeffrey DeNunzio, was appointed Chief Executive Officer, Chief Financial Officer, President, Secretary, Treasurer, and Director of the Company.
